name: Contract field extraction
description: Extract a single key field from a short contract clause — an amount, date, or identifier. Scored by 'contains', so the exact value embedded in a brief answer passes while a garbled or padded one fails. An extraction demo where a careful model clearly wins.

examples.input_text: Extract the total contract value from this clause and return just the amount. Clause: "The total fees payable under this Agreement shall not exceed $42,500, inclusive of all applicable taxes and disbursements."
Extract the effective date from this clause and return just the date. Clause: "This Master Services Agreement is effective as of March 14, 2026 and continues for an initial term of twelve months."
Extract the agreement number from this clause and return just the identifier. Clause: "This Statement of Work is issued under and governed by Master Agreement No. MSA-2026-0817 between the parties."
Extract the notice period from this clause and return just the duration. Clause: "Either party may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon 30 days written notice to the other party."
Extract the late-payment interest rate from this clause and return just the rate. Clause: "Any undisputed invoice not paid within the net-30 term shall accrue interest at a rate of 1.5% per month."
